subcodes.first_line: O ye servants and handmaidens of God! The East and the West are in motion, and the South and the North supplicate unto the King of Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان و کنیزان حق شرق و غرب در حرکت است و جنوب و شمال متضرع بملیک احدیت
subcodes.subjects: @bringing forth results; fruit, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @call to action
